subcodes.first_line: O moist and verdant bough of the blessed Lote-Tree! Thy letter was received and, praise be to God, it betokened the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها القضیب الرطیب من السدره المبارکه نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلالت بر نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @kindliness; humility; self-effacement in teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
